message: Hi B1, my cost is around 50. What's your valuation? Let's agree on a price to split surplus over 20 rounds.
Valuation 60. Let's trade at 55 each round—fair split, steady profit for both. Deal?
Deal! With cost ~50 and val 60, 55 is fair split. I'll ask 55 each round; please bid at least 55 for steady trades.
My valuation is 68. 59 split gives us both 9 profit each round. I'll bid 59 if you ask 59. Deal?
Great, 55 worked twice. Let's lock 55 every round—steady 13 for me, 5 for you. Agree?
Agreed! 55 is fair with my cost ~50—5 for me, 13 for you. I'll ask 55 every round; bid 55 for steady trades over 20 rounds.
Agreed, let's continue at 55 every round for steady profits. I'll ask 55; please bid 55 to ensure we both profit over the remaining rounds.
55 works. I'll bid 55 every round. Let's keep this steady profit stream going—13 for me, 5 for you. Deal locked.

Confirmed—55 locked for all remaining rounds. Steady 13 for me, 5 for you. Let's keep this profitable partnership going.
B1, your val 68 and my cost ~50 mean fair split is 59 (9 each). Let's adjust to 59 for remaining rounds—steady profits. I'll ask 59; please bid 59.
